name: Song Cleaner
description: Automatically deletes a level's downloaded song when you remove the level, so they don't pile up on your disk.

enabled.name: Enable Auto-Cleanup
enabled.description: If on, deleting a saved level will also delete its custom song mp3 (provided no other level still references it).

ignore-shared.name: Skip songs used by other levels
ignore-shared.description: If on, the song is kept whenever another saved or local level still references it. Turning this off forces deletion regardless (not recommended).
